# genesyscloud_speechandtextanalytics_topic (Data Source)

Data source for Genesys Cloud Speech & Text Analytics Topics. Select a topic by name and dialect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "genesyscloud_speechandtextanalytics_topic" "example_topic" {
  name    = "Example Topic"
  dialect = "en-US"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dialect` (String) Topic dialect, e.g. en-US.
- `name` (String) Topic name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
